title: scabiosa columbaria subsp. spreta
intro: Scabiosa columbaria subsp. spreta is a subspecies of the pincushion flower, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its delicate blue or pink flowers and feathery foliage. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Scabiosa columbaria subsp. spreta include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant support, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to soothe digestive issues and promote relaxation.
